overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing exploration of the frontier town of Strawberry. The player character walks along wooden boardwalks, crosses a rustic bridge over a river, and observes the detailed Victorian and log cabin architecture while NPCs go about their activities.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden boardwalk in front of a Victorian boarding house

events.description: camera begins walking forward along the boardwalk past the seated men
reaches the end of the boarding house and approaches the bridge entrance

agents.ego_description: walking along the wooden boardwalk in front of the Victorian-style boarding house with a FOR RENT sign

notable_agents.action: two men in frontier clothing sitting on a stone retaining wall in front of the building

entered.detail: two-story wooden building with ornate trim, decorative porch, and a FOR RENT sign
weathered wooden planks forming the elevated walkway
low stone wall where two men are seated

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a Victorian-style boarding house with a FOR RENT sign hanging from the porch. Two men sit on a stone wall in front as the camera walks along the wooden boardwalk. The architecture features ornate wooden trim typical of frontier towns, with pine trees visible in the background.

events.description: a man on a white horse rides past the camera heading in the opposite direction
camera slows and turns to look over the bridge railing at the river and waterfall below

agents.ego_description: walking across the wooden bridge and pausing to look over the railing at the river

notable_agents.action: man riding a white horse across the bridge toward the camera
man in red shirt and suspenders standing at the bridge railing looking at the water

entered.detail: rustic wooden bridge with log railings crossing the river
flowing river water visible through the bridge railings
wooden structure with a water wheel situated on the riverbank

segments.scene_description: The camera moves onto a wooden bridge crossing a river, passing a man on a white horse and another man standing at the railing. The bridge features rustic log railings, and a water wheel building is visible downstream. The camera slows to look over the railing at the flowing water below.

events.description: camera pans to reveal a waterfall and distant footbridge downstream
camera turns back from the river view to continue walking along the bridge

agents.ego_description: standing on the bridge looking out over the river at the waterfall and surrounding forest

entered.detail: cascading waterfall flowing over rocks downstream
small wooden bridge spanning the river in the distance
steep rock face with trees on top rising from the riverbank

segments.scene_description: The camera pans across the river view, showing a waterfall cascading over rocks and a distant footbridge. The surrounding area is dense with pine trees and rocky cliffs. After observing the scenery, the camera turns back to reveal a large log cabin on the right side of the bridge.

events.description: a young boy walks past the camera, temporarily blocking the view of the river
camera turns to face the large log building while continuing to walk along the boardwalk

agents.ego_description: walking along the riverside boardwalk, passing a young boy and observing the rocky cliff face

notable_agents.action: young boy in white shirt and suspenders walking away from the camera along the boardwalk

entered.detail: two-story log building with red trim and flower boxes on the windows
steep rocky cliff face with water flowing at the base

segments.scene_description: The camera walks along the riverside boardwalk, passing a young boy in suspenders. To the left is a rocky cliff face with water flowing at its base, while a large log cabin with red trim and flower boxes dominates the right side of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: boardwalk alongside a large log building

events.description: dark smoke becomes visible rising in the distance behind the buildings

agents.ego_description: walking alongside the large log building, observing the detailed woodwork, flower boxes, and porch railings

entered.detail: dark smoke rising from behind the trees in the distance
two wooden barrels sitting beside the boardwalk

segments.scene_description: The camera moves alongside the large log cabin, showing detailed wooden architecture including decorative porch railings and flower boxes. Two wooden barrels sit beside the boardwalk. In the distance, dark smoke rises from behind the tree line, suggesting a fire or industrial activity.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a frontier town, transitioning from a residential street to a scenic riverside landscape. It begins by walking along a wooden boardwalk past a Victorian boarding house with a for rent sign and men resting on a stone wall. As the camera moves forward, the scene shifts onto a rustic wooden bridge where it passes a rider on a white horse before pausing to look over the railing at the flowing river and a distant waterfall. The view then expands across rocky cliffs and pine trees before turning back toward the shore to pass a young boy in suspenders. Finally, the camera glides alongside a large log cabin with red trim and flower boxes, moving past wooden barrels as dark smoke rises in the far distance behind the tree line.
